description: Style NoteCreated for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality synthetic leather to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touche.Product DetailsRed criss- crossing thong style straps forming a toe holderPadded footbed with a heel patch in brown and branding embossedOutsole stitched to the upper for durabilityTPU outsole with patterned grooves and an upraised heelMaterial and CareWipe with damp cloth to remove dust
